title: TÃ©cnicas Reunidas and Sinopec to Design 4 GW Green Hydrogen-to-Ammonia Plant in Saudi Arabia
content: TÃ©cnicas Reunidas and Sinopec have secured a FEED contract for a 4 GW green hydrogen-to-ammonia plant in Yanbu, Saudi Arabia, designed to produce 400,000 tons of green hydrogen annually. The project, awarded by ACWA Power, will include hydrogen conversion to green ammonia, desalination facilities, and an export terminal, targeting commercial operation by 2030.
author: Analysts Account
